{"query":"Longlegs spin-off Paramount distribution Neon","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1304,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.avclub.com/longlegs-spin-off-nicolas-cage-oz-perkins","title":"Nicolas Cage and Oz Perkins are working on a new Longlegs","content":"Paramount has picked up the follow-up to Longlegs, the highest-grossing independent horror movie of the decade.
However, though the movie will likely feature Cage’s pancake makeup and shrieking voice, THR‘s sources stress that this isn’t a traditional sequel but rather something within “set in the Longlegs universe.” Additionally, the movie will not be distributed by Neon, which spearheaded the first film’s unique and grabbing marketing strategy."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/film/news/nicolas-cage-longlegs-sequel-osgood-perkins-1236721703/","title":"Nicolas Cage Returning for 'Longlegs' Sequel From Osgood Perkins","content":"Paramount Pictures picked up the rights to the mysterious new project after the serial killer thriller “Longlegs” was a massive hit for Neon in 2024.
Paramount has dated the movie for theatrical release on Jan.
Also producing the movie are Range Media Partners’ Brian Kavanaugh Jones; Perkins and Chris Ferguson, through their company Phobos; and Dave Caplan, under his C2 banner, which originated the rights to the property.
Perkins returns to the “Longlegs” universe after wrapping production on his next feature, “The Young People,” starring Nicole Kidman, Lola Tung and Nico Parker for Neon."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/04/new-longlegs-movie-nicholas-cage-returning-paramount-1236860714/","title":"New ‘Longlegs’ Film With Nicholas Cage In The Works At Paramount","content":"Paramount has won the rights to a new feature film set in the universe of Longlegs, Deadline has learned.
Nicolas Cage will star in and produce the follow-up film.
Osgood Perkins, who wrote and directed the original film starring Cage, Maika Monroe, Alicia Witt, Kiernan Shipka, Blair Underwood and more, will pen the script, direct, and produce.
Details are being kept under wraps, but the feature will be set in the same universe as the original.
The first film delivered the best original horror opening year-to-date when it hit theaters in July 2024.
He and his producing partner Ferguson and their production banner Phobos have a first-look deal with Neon, the Tom Quinn-run 9-year old distribution company."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Longlegs","title":"Longlegs - Wikipedia","content":"Longlegs is a 2024 American horror film written and directed by Osgood Perkins.
In February 2023, Nicolas Cage and Maika Monroe came on board to star, with Cage also producing under his Saturn Films banner.
In March, Alicia Witt and Blair Underwood were announced as part of the cast.
In February 2023, Neon acquired the film's North American rights at the European Film Market.
Longlegs grossed $74.3 million in the United States and Canada, and $53.6 million in other territories, for a worldwide total of $128 million.
After making $10 million on its first day (including $3 million from Thursday night previews, both records for Neon), weekend estimates were raised to $20–23 million.
In April 2026, it was announced that a new film in the Longlegs universe was in the works, with Perkins returning to write and direct, and Cage reprising his role.
Paramount Pictures takes over distribution rights from Neon."}]}

Osgood Perkins and Nicolas Cage. Osgood Perkins is working on a new *Longlegs* feature, a follow-up to the filmmaker’s mystery horror thriller that became highest-grossing independent film of the past decade. And in a twist out of the *Longlegs* playbook, rather than original distributor Neon being involved, this one has Skydance-owned Paramount Pictures as the project’s new home. Paramount has picked up the rights to the new mystery *Longlegs* project, which Perkins has written and will direct as well as produce. ### 'Spider-Noir' Star Lamorne Morris Is Ready for More Robbie Robertson. Paramount and Perkins are keeping details in the basement but sources stress that this new *Longlegs* is not a sequel but something “set in the *Longlegs* universe.”. Longlegs was an out-of-nowhere hit when released by Neon in 2024, launching Perkins as a name horror filmmaker and establishing the star bona fides of Maika Monroe.","score":0.7366474,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/p/DXILiwuDWRh","title":"A Shot | Paramount is set to release the next Longlegs film, taking over from ...","content":"Paramount is set to release the next Longlegs film, taking over from NEON, which distributed the original. Reports say NEON moved on from the","score":0.71948266,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.indiewire.com/news/breaking-news/new-longlegs-movie-oz-perkins-nicolas-cage-paramount-1235189050","title":"New 'Longlegs' Movie from Oz Perkins, Nicolas Cage Set at Paramount","content":"# Osgood Perkins Moves to Paramount with New ‘Longlegs’ Movie Starring Nicolas Cage. IndieWire has confirmed that the indie horror writer/director is heading to Paramount for his next project, a new “Longlegs” movie that will once again star Nicolas Cage as the eponymous killer. Plot details are being kept under wraps, but a source familiar with the project described it as a new film set in the “Longlegs” universe. The move represents a major shift for Perkins, who has become synonymous with Neon since releasing “Longlegs” in 2024. While Perkins had been directing films since 2015’s “The Blackcoat’s Daughter,” “Longlegs” was many cinephiles’ first introduction to his work, thanks in no small part to Neon’s viral marketing campaign. “There’s no question ‘Longlegs’ is still Perkins’ best film, but when the director delivered ‘The Monkey’ earlier this year Neon made a mess of the movie’s campaign,” Foreman wrote. Paramount has yet to announce a release date or production timeline for the new “Longlegs” movie.","score":0.67140645,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://dailydead.com/paramount-pictures-acquires-rights-to-new-movie-set-in-the-longlegs-universe-osgood-perkins-to-write-direct-produce","title":"Paramount Pictures Acquires Rights to New Movie \"Set in the Longlegs ...","content":"While the original film was released by Neon, Paramount is taking on this project, which Osgood Perkins will write, direct, and produce.","score":0.50930125,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.88,"request_id":"ebc73f1e-54d2-4489-aa59-b79c11d3d2e8"}
